botOffer.subtitle: Professional AI-powered trading bots. Payment exclusively in FTRX token. Every client receives a dedicated panel with full real-time bot analytics.
botOffer.spreadDesc: AI-powered market making with automated spread analysis across Solana DEXes. The bot uses machine learning to identify optimal entry points and executes trades with millisecond precision, generating stable profits with minimal risk.
botOffer.sniperDesc: AI-driven token detection on Raydium, Meteora and pump.fun at launch. Buys within the first seconds of listing and sells via Take Profit / Stop Loss, ensuring maximum gains from earliest entry with AI risk filtering.
botOffer.tradeDesc: Advanced AI trading bot based on neural network signals and technical analysis. Executes scalping, swing trading and momentum strategies on top Solana pairs with automated risk management.
botOffer.arbitrageDesc: AI detects price discrepancies of the same token across different liquidity pools and DEXes. Executes instant arbitrage trades with guaranteed profit on every operation using predictive algorithms.
botOffer.copytradeDesc: AI-curated copy trading of the best Solana ecosystem traders in real-time. Choose from verified portfolios with confirmed profit history and automatically replicate their strategies with AI optimization.
botOffer.copytradePremiumDesc: Access to FuturoX AI team portfolios with generated profit up to $50,000 USD
botOffer.trendDesc: AI trend detection bot that identifies emerging market movements before they happen. Uses deep learning models to analyze on-chain data, social sentiment and volume patterns to catch trending tokens early.
botOffer.panelDesc: Every client receives their own panel with full real-time bot analytics. Track profits, transaction history, statistics and performance - everything live, 24/7.
botOffer.panelNonCustodial: FuturoX AI does not hold client funds. Non-Custodial model - profits are automatically sent to your wallet.
botOffer.exclusiveDesc: Option to purchase any bot exclusively as part of an individual offer. Dedicated configuration, priority support and full strategy personalization for your needs.

aiOffer.subtitle: Reduce costs by up to 80%, automate your business and earn with AI. Full solutions for companies and individuals - from website to autonomous AI agents. Payment in FTRX.
aiOffer.costTitle: How AI reduces your company costs
aiOffer.individualTitle: How AI works for you individually
aiOffer.biz1Desc: AI chatbot handles 90% of customer inquiries 24/7 without human agents. Multilingual support, instant responses.
aiOffer.biz2Desc: AI generates social media posts, blog articles, ad copy and email campaigns automatically. No copywriter needed.
aiOffer.biz3Desc: Automated invoice processing, expense categorization, financial reports and tax preparation with AI accuracy.
aiOffer.biz4Desc: AI qualifies leads, sends personalized follow-ups, schedules meetings and manages your entire sales pipeline.
aiOffer.biz5Desc: AI screens resumes, conducts initial interviews, onboards employees and manages HR documentation automatically.
aiOffer.biz6Desc: AI-built and managed website with SEO, product listings, order processing and customer engagement - fully automated.
aiOffer.ind1Desc: Launch your own website or online store managed entirely by AI. From design to content to sales optimization.
aiOffer.ind2Desc: Your personal AI assistant that handles emails, scheduling, research, data analysis and task automation.
aiOffer.ind3Desc: Generate professional articles, social media content, scripts and marketing materials with AI on autopilot.
aiOffer.ind4Desc: Personal AI that analyzes crypto markets, sends alerts, tracks portfolios and suggests optimal entry/exit points.
aiOffer.ind5Desc: AI handles client communication, project management, invoicing and delivery. Run a freelance business on autopilot.
aiOffer.ind6Desc: From MVP to market - AI builds your product, creates marketing, handles support and scales your startup.
aiOffer.packagesSubtitle: Choose the right plan for your needs. All payments in FTRX token. Cancel anytime.
aiOffer.agentsF1: Custom AI agent for your use case
aiOffer.companyTitle: Run a full company with AI - zero employees
aiOffer.companyDesc: FuturoX AI enables you to launch and run an entire business powered by artificial intelligence. From website creation to customer service, marketing, sales and accounting - all automated, 24/7, without hiring a single employee.
aiOffer.companyF1: AI builds and manages your website & store
aiOffer.companyF3: AI runs marketing campaigns & social media
aiOffer.companyF5: Revenue goes directly to your wallet (non-custodial)
